tEn: Unsupervised Representation Learning with Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Networks
tZh: 使用深度卷积生成对抗网络的无监督表示学习
sEn: DCGANs learn hierarchical representations from object parts to scenes in an unsupervised manner.
sZh: DCGAN以无监督方式学习从物体部件到场景的层次化表示。
absEn: In recent years, supervised learning with convolutional networks (CNNs) has seen huge adoption in computer vision applications. Comparatively, unsupervised learning with CNNs has received less attention. In this work we hope to help bridge the gap between the success of CNNs for supervised learning and unsupervised learning. We introduce a class of CNNs called deep convolutional generative adversarial networks (DCGANs), that have certain architectural constraints, and demonstrate that they are a strong candidate for unsupervised learning. Training on various image datasets, we show convincing evidence that our deep convolutional adversarial pair learns a hierarchy of representations from object parts to scenes in both the generator and discriminator. Additionally, we use the learned features for novel tasks - demonstrating their applicability as general image representations.
absZh: 近年来，卷积网络（CNN）在有监督学习的计算机视觉应用中得到了广泛采用。相比之下，CNN在无监督学习方面的关注较少。在这项工作中，我们希望帮助弥合CNN在有监督学习和无监督学习成功之间的差距。我们引入了一类称为深度卷积生成对抗网络（DCGAN）的CNN，它们具有特定的架构约束，并证明它们是无监督学习的强有力候选者。在各种图像数据集上进行训练，我们展示了令人信服的证据，表明我们的深度卷积对抗对在生成器和判别器中都学习了从物体部件到场景的层次化表示。此外，我们将学习到的特征用于新任务——展示了它们作为通用图像表示的适用性。

contrib.en: Proposes architectural constraints for stable training of deep convolutional GANs (DCGANs).
contrib.zh: 提出用于深度卷积生成对抗网络（DCGAN）稳定训练的架构约束。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that DCGANs learn hierarchical representations from object parts to scenes.
contrib.zh: 证明DCGAN从物体部件到场景学习层次化表示。

contrib.en: Shows learned features achieve 82.8% accuracy on CIFAR-10 via linear SVM, outperforming K-means baselines.
contrib.zh: 展示学习特征在CIFAR-10上通过线性SVM达到82.8%准确率，优于K-means基线。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art 22.48% test error on SVHN with only 1000 labeled examples.
contrib.zh: 在仅1000个标注样本的SVHN上达到22.48%测试误差，为最优。

contrib.en: Visualizes filters and demonstrates vector arithmetic in latent space for semantic manipulation.
contrib.zh: 可视化滤波器并展示潜在空间中用于语义操作的向量算术。

contrib.en: Shows unsupervised learning of object detectors (e.g., windows) in the generator.
contrib.zh: 展示生成器中无监督学习物体检测器（如窗户）。

limits.en: Model instability persists; filters may collapse to oscillating modes with longer training.
limits.zh: 模型不稳定性持续存在；长时间训练后滤波器可能坍缩为振荡模式。

limits.en: Performance on CIFAR-10 is lower than Exemplar CNNs, a supervised unsupervised method.
limits.zh: CIFAR-10性能低于Exemplar CNN（一种监督无监督方法）。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to image datasets; generalization to video or audio not explored.
limits.zh: 评估限于图像数据集；未探索对视频或音频的泛化。

limits.en: Requires careful hyperparameter tuning (e.g., learning rate, momentum) for stability.
limits.zh: 需要仔细调整超参数（如学习率、动量）以保持稳定。

limits.en: No quantitative evaluation using log-likelihood; relies on visual and task-based metrics.
limits.zh: 未使用对数似然进行定量评估；依赖视觉和基于任务的指标。

items.en: In recent years, supervised learning with convolutional networks (CNNs) has seen huge adoption in computer vision applications. Comparatively, unsupervised learning with CNNs has received less attention. In this work we hope to help bridge the gap between the success of CNNs for supervised learning and unsupervised learning. We introduce a class of CNNs called deep convolutional generative adversarial networks (DCGANs), that have certain architectural constraints, and demonstrate that they are a strong candidate for unsupervised learning. Training on various image datasets, we show convincing evidence that our deep convolutional adversarial pair learns a hierarchy of representations from object parts to scenes in both the generator and discriminator. Additionally, we use the learned features for novel tasks - demonstrating their applicability as general image representations.
items.zh: 近年来，使用卷积网络（CNN）的监督学习在计算机视觉应用中得到了广泛采用。相比之下，使用CNN的无监督学习受到的关注较少。在这项工作中，我们希望帮助弥合CNN在监督学习和无监督学习之间成功应用的差距。我们引入了一类称为深度卷积生成对抗网络（DCGAN）的CNN，它们具有特定的架构约束，并证明它们是无监督学习的强有力候选者。在各种图像数据集上进行训练，我们展示了令人信服的证据，表明我们的深度卷积对抗对在生成器和判别器中都学习了从物体部分到场景的表示层次结构。此外，我们将学习到的特征用于新任务——证明了它们作为通用图像表示的适用性。

items.en: Learning reusable feature representations from large unlabeled datasets has been an area of active research. In the context of computer vision, one can leverage the practically unlimited amount of unlabeled images and videos to learn good intermediate representations, which can then be used on a variety of supervised learning tasks such as image classification. We propose that one way to build good image representations is by training Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) (Goodfellow et al., 2014), and later reusing parts of the generator and discriminator networks as feature extractors for supervised tasks. GANs provide an attractive alternative to maximum likelihood techniques. One can additionally argue that their learning process and the lack of a heuristic cost function (such as pixel-wise independent mean-square error) are attractive to representation learning. GANs have been known to be unstable to train, often resulting in generators that produce nonsensical outputs. There has been very limited published research in trying to understand and visualize what GANs learn, and the intermediate representations of multi-layer GANs.
items.zh: 从大型无标注数据集中学习可复用的特征表示一直是一个活跃的研究领域。在计算机视觉的背景下，人们可以利用几乎无限量的无标注图像和视频来学习良好的中间表示，然后将其用于各种监督学习任务，如图像分类。我们提出，构建良好图像表示的一种方法是训练生成对抗网络（GAN）（Goodfellow等人，2014），然后重用生成器和判别器网络的部分作为监督任务的特征提取器。GAN为最大似然技术提供了一种有吸引力的替代方案。此外，可以认为它们的学习过程以及缺乏启发式代价函数（如逐像素独立的均方误差）对表示学习具有吸引力。众所周知，GAN的训练不稳定，常常导致生成器产生无意义的输出。关于理解和可视化GAN学习内容以及多层GAN的中间表示方面的已发表研究非常有限。

items.en: In this paper, we make the following contributions
items.zh: 在本文中，我们做出了以下贡献：

items.en: We propose and evaluate a set of constraints on the architectural topology of Convolutional GANs that make them stable to train in most settings. We name this class of architectures Deep Convolutional GANs (DCGAN)
items.zh: 我们提出并评估了一组卷积GAN架构拓扑的约束条件，这些约束使它们在大多数设置下能够稳定训练。我们将这类架构命名为深度卷积GAN（DCGAN）。

items.en: We use the trained discriminators for image classification tasks, showing competitive performance with other unsupervised algorithms.
items.zh: 我们将训练好的判别器用于图像分类任务，展示了与其他无监督算法相竞争的性能。

items.en: We visualize the filters learnt by GANs and empirically show that specific filters have learned to draw specific objects.
items.zh: 我们可视化了GAN学习到的滤波器，并经验性地表明特定滤波器学会了绘制特定物体。

items.en: We show that the generators have interesting vector arithmetic properties allowing for easy manipulation of many semantic qualities of generated samples.
items.zh: 我们展示了生成器具有有趣的向量算术性质，允许轻松操纵生成样本的许多语义特征。

full.secZh: 2.1 无标签数据的表示学习

items.en: Unsupervised representation learning is a fairly well studied problem in general computer vision research, as well as in the context of images. A classic approach to unsupervised representation learning is to do clustering on the data (for example using K-means), and leverage the clusters for improved classification scores. In the context of images, one can do hierarchical clustering of image patches (Coates & Ng, 2012) to learn powerful image representations. Another popular method is to train auto-encoders (convolutionally, stacked (Vincent et al., 2010), separating the what and where components of the code (Zhao et al., 2015), ladder structures (Rasmus et al., 2015)) that encode an image into a compact code, and decode the code to reconstruct the image as accurately as possible. These methods have also been shown to learn good feature representations from image pixels. Deep belief networks (Lee et al., 2009) have also been shown to work well in learning hierarchical representations.
items.zh: 无监督表示学习在一般计算机视觉研究以及图像上下文中是一个相当充分研究的问题。一种经典的无监督表示学习方法是对数据进行聚类（例如使用K-means），并利用聚类结果来提高分类得分。在图像上下文中，可以对图像块进行层次聚类（Coates & Ng, 2012）来学习强大的图像表示。另一种流行的方法是训练自编码器（卷积的、堆叠的（Vincent等人，2010）、分离编码的what和where成分（Zhao等人，2015）、阶梯结构（Rasmus等人，2015）），将图像编码为紧凑的编码，并解码编码以尽可能准确地重建图像。这些方法也被证明可以从图像像素中学习良好的特征表示。深度信念网络（Lee等人，2009）也被证明在学习层次表示方面效果良好。

items.en: Generative image models are well studied and fall into two categories: parametric and non-parametric.
items.zh: 生成式图像模型得到了充分研究，分为两类：参数化和非参数化。

items.en: The non-parametric models often do matching from a database of existing images, often matching patches of images, and have been used in texture synthesis (Efros et al., 1999), super-resolution (Freeman et al., 2002) and in-painting (Hays & Efros, 2007).
items.zh: 非参数模型通常从现有图像数据库中进行匹配，通常匹配图像块，并已用于纹理合成（Efros等人，1999）、超分辨率（Freeman等人，2002）和图像修复（Hays & Efros, 2007）。

items.en: Parametric models for generating images has been explored extensively (for example on MNIST digits or for texture synthesis (Portilla & Simoncelli, 2000)). However, generating natural images of the real world have had not much success until recently. A variational sampling approach to generating images (Kingma & Welling, 2013) has had some success, but the samples often suffer from being blurry. Another approach generates images using an iterative forward diffusion process (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2015). Generative Adversarial Networks (Goodfellow et al., 2014) generated images suffering from being noisy and incomprehensible. A laplacian pyramid extension to this approach (Denton et al., 2015) showed higher quality images, but they still suffered from the objects looking wobbly because of noise introduced in chaining multiple models. A recurrent network approach (Gregor et al., 2015) and a deconvolution network approach (Dosovitskiy et al., 2014) have also recently had some success with generating natural images. However, they have not leveraged the generators for supervised tasks.
items.zh: 用于生成图像的参数模型已被广泛探索（例如在MNIST数字或纹理合成中（Portilla & Simoncelli, 2000））。然而，生成真实世界的自然图像直到最近才取得一些成功。一种变分采样方法用于生成图像（Kingma & Welling, 2013）取得了一些成功，但样本通常模糊不清。另一种方法使用迭代前向扩散过程生成图像（Sohl-Dickstein等人，2015）。生成对抗网络（Goodfellow等人，2014）生成的图像存在噪声且难以理解。该方法的拉普拉斯金字塔扩展（Denton等人，2015）展示了更高质量的图像，但由于链式多个模型引入的噪声，物体看起来仍然摇摆不定。最近，循环网络方法（Gregor等人，2015）和反卷积网络方法（Dosovitskiy等人，2014）在生成自然图像方面也取得了一些成功。然而，它们没有利用生成器进行监督任务。

items.en: One constant criticism of using neural networks has been that they are black-box methods, with little understanding of what the networks do in the form of a simple human-consumable algorithm. In the context of CNNs, Zeiler et. al. (Zeiler & Fergus, 2014) showed that by using deconvolutions and filtering the maximal activations, one can find the approximate purpose of each convolution filter in the network. Similarly, using a gradient descent on the inputs lets us inspect the ideal image that activates certain subsets of filters (Mordvintsev et al., ).
items.zh: 对使用神经网络的一个持续批评是它们是黑盒方法，对于网络以简单的人类可理解算法形式所做的事情知之甚少。在CNN的背景下，Zeiler等人（Zeiler & Fergus, 2014）表明，通过使用反卷积和过滤最大激活，可以找到网络中每个卷积滤波器的近似用途。类似地，对输入进行梯度下降使我们能够检查激活某些滤波器子集的理想图像（Mordvintsev等人）。

items.en: Historical attempts to scale up GANs using CNNs to model images have been unsuccessful. This motivated the authors of LAPGAN (Denton et al., 2015) to develop an alternative approach to iteratively upscale low resolution generated images which can be modeled more reliably. We also encountered difficulties attempting to scale GANs using CNN architectures commonly used in the supervised literature. However, after extensive model exploration we identified a family of architectures that resulted in stable training across a range of datasets and allowed for training higher resolution and deeper generative models.
items.zh: 历史上，尝试使用CNN扩展GAN以建模图像的努力并不成功。这促使LAPGAN的作者（Denton等人，2015）开发了一种替代方法，迭代地放大低分辨率生成的图像，这些图像可以更可靠地建模。我们在尝试使用监督文献中常用的CNN架构扩展GAN时也遇到了困难。然而，经过广泛的模型探索，我们确定了一族架构，这些架构在一系列数据集上实现了稳定训练，并允许训练更高分辨率和更深层的生成模型。

items.en: Core to our approach is adopting and modifying three recently demonstrated changes to CNN architectures.
items.zh: 我们方法的核心是采用并修改了最近对CNN架构的三项改进。

items.en: The first is the all convolutional net (Springenberg et al., 2014) which replaces deterministic spatial pooling functions (such as maxpooling) with strided convolutions, allowing the network to learn its own spatial downsampling. We use this approach in our generator, allowing it to learn its own spatial upsampling, and discriminator.
items.zh: 第一是全卷积网络（Springenberg等人，2014），它用步长卷积替换了确定性的空间池化函数（如最大池化），允许网络学习自己的空间下采样。我们在生成器中使用这种方法，允许它学习自己的空间上采样，并在判别器中也使用。

items.en: Second is the trend towards eliminating fully connected layers on top of convolutional features. The strongest example of this is global average pooling which has been utilized in state of the art image classification models (Mordvintsev et al., ). We found global average pooling increased model stability but hurt convergence speed. A middle ground of directly connecting the highest convolutional features to the input and output respectively of the generator and discriminator worked well. The first layer of the GAN, which takes a uniform noise distribution Z𝑍Z as input, could be called fully connected as it is just a matrix multiplication, but the result is reshaped into a 4-dimensional tensor and used as the start of the convolution stack. For the discriminator, the last convolution layer is flattened and then fed into a single sigmoid output. See Fig. 1 for a visualization of an example model architecture.
items.zh: 第二是消除卷积特征之上的全连接层的趋势。最典型的例子是全局平均池化，它已被用于最先进的图像分类模型（Mordvintsev等人）。我们发现全局平均池化提高了模型稳定性，但降低了收敛速度。一个折中方案是直接将最高卷积特征分别连接到生成器和判别器的输入和输出，效果良好。GAN的第一层接收均匀噪声分布Z作为输入，可以称为全连接层，因为它只是矩阵乘法，但结果被重塑为4维张量，并用作卷积堆栈的起点。对于判别器，最后一个卷积层被展平，然后输入到一个sigmoid输出。图1显示了一个示例模型架构的可视化。

items.en: Third is Batch Normalization (Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015) which stabilizes learning by normalizing the input to each unit to have zero mean and unit variance. This helps deal with training problems that arise due to poor initialization and helps gradient flow in deeper models. This proved critical to get deep generators to begin learning, preventing the generator from collapsing all samples to a single point which is a common failure mode observed in GANs. Directly applying batchnorm to all layers however, resulted in sample oscillation and model instability. This was avoided by not applying batchnorm to the generator output layer and the discriminator input layer.
items.zh: 第三是批归一化（Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015），它通过将每个单元的输入归一化为零均值和单位方差来稳定学习。这有助于处理由于初始化不良引起的训练问题，并有助于更深层模型中的梯度流动。这对于让深层生成器开始学习至关重要，防止生成器将所有样本坍缩到单个点，这是GAN中常见的失败模式。然而，直接对所有层应用批归一化会导致样本振荡和模型不稳定。通过不对生成器输出层和判别器输入层应用批归一化，可以避免这种情况。

items.en: The ReLU activation (Nair & Hinton, 2010) is used in the generator with the exception of the output layer which uses the Tanh function. We observed that using a bounded activation allowed the model to learn more quickly to saturate and cover the color space of the training distribution. Within the discriminator we found the leaky rectified activation (Maas et al., 2013) (Xu et al., 2015) to work well, especially for higher resolution modeling. This is in contrast to the original GAN paper, which used the maxout activation (Goodfellow et al., 2013).
items.zh: 生成器中使用ReLU激活函数（Nair & Hinton, 2010），但输出层使用Tanh函数。我们观察到，使用有界激活函数使模型能够更快地学习饱和并覆盖训练分布的颜色空间。在判别器中，我们发现带泄露的修正激活函数（Maas等人，2013）（Xu等人，2015）效果良好，尤其适用于更高分辨率的建模。这与原始GAN论文中使用maxout激活函数（Goodfellow等人，2013）形成对比。

items.en: Architecture guidelines for stable Deep Convolutional GANs • Replace any pooling layers with strided convolutions (discriminator) and fractional-strided convolutions (generator). • Use batchnorm in both the generator and the discriminator. • Remove fully connected hidden layers for deeper architectures. • Use ReLU activation in generator for all layers except for the output, which uses Tanh. • Use LeakyReLU activation in the discriminator for all layers.
items.zh: 稳定深度卷积GAN的架构指南：• 用步长卷积（判别器）和分数步长卷积（生成器）替换任何池化层。• 在生成器和判别器中都使用批归一化。• 对于更深层的架构，移除全连接隐藏层。• 在生成器中使用ReLU激活函数，除输出层使用Tanh外。• 在判别器中对所有层使用LeakyReLU激活函数。

items.capEn: Figure 1: DCGAN generator used for LSUN scene modeling. A 100 dimensional uniform distribution Z𝑍Z is projected to a small spatial extent convolutional representation with many feature maps. A series of four fractionally-strided convolutions (in some recent papers, these are wrongly called deconvolutions) then convert this high level representation into a 64×64646464\times 64 pixel image. Notably, no fully connected or pooling layers are used.
items.capZh: 图1：用于LSUN场景建模的DCGAN生成器。一个100维的均匀分布Z被投影到一个具有许多特征图的小空间范围卷积表示上。一系列四个分数步长卷积（在最近的一些论文中，这些被错误地称为反卷积）然后将这个高层表示转换为64×64像素的图像。值得注意的是，没有使用全连接层或池化层。

items.en: We trained DCGANs on three datasets, Large-scale Scene Understanding (LSUN) (Yu et al., 2015), Imagenet-1k and a newly assembled Faces dataset. Details on the usage of each of these datasets are given below.
items.zh: 我们在三个数据集上训练了DCGAN：大规模场景理解（LSUN）（Yu等人，2015）、Imagenet-1k和一个新收集的人脸数据集。以下详细说明每个数据集的使用情况。

items.en: No pre-processing was applied to training images besides scaling to the range of the tanh activation function [-1, 1]. All models were trained with mini-batch stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with a mini-batch size of 128. All weights were initialized from a zero-centered Normal distribution with standard deviation 0.02. In the LeakyReLU, the slope of the leak was set to 0.2 in all models. While previous GAN work has used momentum to accelerate training, we used the Adam optimizer (Kingma & Ba, 2014) with tuned hyperparameters. We found the suggested learning rate of 0.001, to be too high, using 0.0002 instead. Additionally, we found leaving the momentum term β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1} at the suggested value of 0.9 resulted in training oscillation and instability while reducing it to 0.5 helped stabilize training.
items.zh: 除了将图像缩放到tanh激活函数范围[-1, 1]外，没有对训练图像进行预处理。所有模型均使用小批量随机梯度下降（SGD）进行训练，小批量大小为128。所有权重从均值为零、标准差为0.02的正态分布初始化。在LeakyReLU中，所有模型的泄漏斜率设置为0.2。虽然之前的GAN工作使用动量来加速训练，但我们使用Adam优化器（Kingma & Ba, 2014）并调整了超参数。我们发现建议的学习率0.001过高，因此改用0.0002。此外，我们发现将动量项β1保持在建议值0.9会导致训练振荡和不稳定，而将其降低到0.5有助于稳定训练。

items.en: As visual quality of samples from generative image models has improved, concerns of over-fitting and memorization of training samples have risen. To demonstrate how our model scales with more data and higher resolution generation, we train a model on the LSUN bedrooms dataset containing a little over 3 million training examples. Recent analysis has shown that there is a direct link between how fast models learn and their generalization performance (Hardt et al., 2015). We show samples from one epoch of training (Fig.2), mimicking online learning, in addition to samples after convergence (Fig.3), as an opportunity to demonstrate that our model is not producing high quality samples via simply overfitting/memorizing training examples. No data augmentation was applied to the images.
items.zh: 随着生成图像模型样本的视觉质量提高，对过拟合和记忆训练样本的担忧也随之增加。为了展示我们的模型如何随着更多数据和更高分辨率生成而扩展，我们在包含超过300万个训练样本的LSUN卧室数据集上训练了一个模型。最近的分析表明，模型学习速度与其泛化性能之间存在直接联系（Hardt等人，2015）。我们展示了一个训练周期（图2）的样本，模拟在线学习，以及收敛后的样本（图3），以证明我们的模型并非通过简单地过拟合/记忆训练样本来生成高质量样本。没有对图像应用数据增强。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Generated bedrooms after one training pass through the dataset. Theoretically, the model could learn to memorize training examples, but this is experimentally unlikely as we train with a small learning rate and minibatch SGD. We are aware of no prior empirical evidence demonstrating memorization with SGD and a small learning rate.
items.capZh: 图2：在数据集上完成一次训练后生成的卧室图像。理论上，模型可以学习记忆训练样本，但实验上不太可能，因为我们使用小学习率和小批量SGD进行训练。据我们所知，之前没有经验证据表明使用SGD和小学习率会导致记忆。

items.en: To further decrease the likelihood of the generator memorizing input examples (Fig.2) we perform a simple image de-duplication process. We fit a 3072-128-3072 de-noising dropout regularized RELU autoencoder on 32x32 downsampled center-crops of training examples. The resulting code layer activations are then binarized via thresholding the ReLU activation which has been shown to be an effective information preserving technique (Srivastava et al., 2014) and provides a convenient form of semantic-hashing, allowing for linear time de-duplication . Visual inspection of hash collisions showed high precision with an estimated false positive rate of less than 1 in 100. Additionally, the technique detected and removed approximately 275,000 near duplicates, suggesting a high recall.
items.zh: 为了进一步降低生成器记忆输入样本的可能性（图2），我们执行了一个简单的图像去重过程。我们在训练样本的32x32下采样中心裁剪上拟合了一个3072-128-3072的去噪dropout正则化ReLU自编码器。然后通过阈值化ReLU激活将得到的编码层激活二值化，这已被证明是一种有效的信息保留技术（Srivastava等人，2014），并提供了一种方便的语义哈希形式，允许线性时间去重。对哈希冲突的视觉检查显示高精度，估计假阳性率低于1/100。此外，该技术检测并移除了大约275,000个近似重复项，表明召回率很高。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Generated bedrooms after five epochs of training. There appears to be evidence of visual under-fitting via repeated noise textures across multiple samples such as the base boards of some of the beds.
items.capZh: 图3：经过五个训练周期后生成的卧室图像。存在视觉欠拟合的证据，例如多个样本中重复的噪声纹理，如一些床的踢脚板。

items.en: We scraped images containing human faces from random web image queries of peoples names. The people names were acquired from dbpedia, with a criterion that they were born in the modern era. This dataset has 3M images from 10K people. We run an OpenCV face detector on these images, keeping the detections that are sufficiently high resolution, which gives us approximately 350,000 face boxes. We use these face boxes for training. No data augmentation was applied to the images.
items.zh: 我们从随机网络图像查询人名中抓取包含人脸的图像。人名来自dbpedia，标准是出生于现代。该数据集包含来自10,000人的300万张图像。我们在这些图像上运行OpenCV人脸检测器，保留分辨率足够高的检测结果，得到大约350,000个人脸框。我们使用这些脸框进行训练。没有对图像应用数据增强。

items.en: We use Imagenet-1k (Deng et al., 2009) as a source of natural images for unsupervised training. We train on 32×32323232\times 32 min-resized center crops. No data augmentation was applied to the images.
items.zh: 我们使用Imagenet-1k（Deng等人，2009）作为无监督训练的自然图像来源。我们在32x32的最小调整大小中心裁剪上进行训练。没有对图像应用数据增强。

full.sec: 5.1 Classifying CIFAR-10 using GANs as a feature extractor
full.secZh: 5.1 使用GAN作为特征提取器对CIFAR-10分类

items.en: One common technique for evaluating the quality of unsupervised representation learning algorithms is to apply them as a feature extractor on supervised datasets and evaluate the performance of linear models fitted on top of these features.
items.zh: 评估无监督表示学习算法质量的一种常用技术是将其作为特征提取器应用于监督数据集，并评估在此基础上拟合的线性模型的性能。

items.en: On the CIFAR-10 dataset, a very strong baseline performance has been demonstrated from a well tuned single layer feature extraction pipeline utilizing K-means as a feature learning algorithm. When using a very large amount of feature maps (4800) this technique achieves 80.6% accuracy. An unsupervised multi-layered extension of the base algorithm reaches 82.0% accuracy (Coates & Ng, 2011). To evaluate the quality of the representations learned by DCGANs for supervised tasks, we train on Imagenet-1k and then use the discriminator’s convolutional features from all layers, maxpooling each layers representation to produce a 4×4444\times 4 spatial grid. These features are then flattened and concatenated to form a 28672 dimensional vector and a regularized linear L2-SVM classifier is trained on top of them. This achieves 82.8% accuracy, out performing all K-means based approaches. Notably, the discriminator has many less feature maps (512 in the highest layer) compared to K-means based techniques, but does result in a larger total feature vector size due to the many layers of 4×4444\times 4 spatial locations. The performance of DCGANs is still less than that of Exemplar CNNs (Dosovitskiy et al., 2015), a technique which trains normal discriminative CNNs in an unsupervised fashion to differentiate between specifically chosen, aggressively augmented, exemplar samples from the source dataset. Further improvements could be made by finetuning the discriminator’s representations, but we leave this for future work. Additionally, since our DCGAN was never trained on CIFAR-10 this experiment also demonstrates the domain robustness of the learned features.
items.zh: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，使用K-means作为特征学习算法的精心调整的单层特征提取流程已展现出非常强的基线性能。当使用大量特征图（4800）时，该技术达到80.6%的准确率。该基础算法的无监督多层扩展达到82.0%的准确率（Coates & Ng, 2011）。为了评估DCGAN在监督任务中学到的表示质量，我们在Imagenet-1k上训练，然后使用判别器所有层的卷积特征，对每层表示进行最大池化以产生4x4的空间网格。然后将这些特征展平并连接成28672维向量，并在其上训练正则化的线性L2-SVM分类器。这达到了82.8%的准确率，优于所有基于K-means的方法。值得注意的是，与基于K-means的技术相比，判别器的特征图更少（最高层为512个），但由于多层4x4空间位置，导致总特征向量更大。DCGAN的性能仍然低于Exemplar CNN（Dosovitskiy等人，2015），后者是一种以无监督方式训练正常判别CNN的技术，用于区分从源数据集中特别选择、经过积极增强的样本。通过微调判别器的表示可以进一步改进，但我们将其留作未来工作。此外，由于我们的DCGAN从未在CIFAR-10上训练过，该实验也证明了所学特征的领域鲁棒性。

full.sec: 5.2 Classifying SVHN digits using GANs as a feature extractor
full.secZh: 5.2 使用GAN作为特征提取器对SVHN数字分类

items.en: On the StreetView House Numbers dataset (SVHN)(Netzer et al., 2011), we use the features of the discriminator of a DCGAN for supervised purposes when labeled data is scarce. Following similar dataset preparation rules as in the CIFAR-10 experiments, we split off a validation set of 10,000 examples from the non-extra set and use it for all hyperparameter and model selection. 1000 uniformly class distributed training examples are randomly selected and used to train a regularized linear L2-SVM classifier on top of the same feature extraction pipeline used for CIFAR-10. This achieves state of the art (for classification using 1000 labels) at 22.48% test error, improving upon another modifcation of CNNs designed to leverage unlabled data (Zhao et al., 2015). Additionally, we validate that the CNN architecture used in DCGAN is not the key contributing factor of the model’s performance by training a purely supervised CNN with the same architecture on the same data and optimizing this model via random search over 64 hyperparameter trials (Bergstra & Bengio, 2012). It achieves a signficantly higher 28.87% validation error.
items.zh: 在街景门牌号数据集（SVHN）（Netzer等人，2011）上，当标记数据稀缺时，我们使用DCGAN判别器的特征进行监督目的。遵循与CIFAR-10实验类似的数据集准备规则，我们从非额外集中分割出10,000个样本作为验证集，用于所有超参数和模型选择。随机选择1000个均匀类分布的训练样本，并在与CIFAR-10相同的特征提取流程上训练正则化的线性L2-SVM分类器。这在使用1000个标签的分类中达到了最先进的22.48%测试错误率，优于另一种旨在利用无标签数据的CNN修改（Zhao等人，2015）。此外，我们通过在同一数据上训练具有相同架构的纯监督CNN，并通过随机搜索64个超参数试验（Bergstra & Bengio, 2012）优化该模型，验证了DCGAN中使用的CNN架构并非模型性能的关键因素。该模型达到了显著更高的28.87%验证错误率。

full.sec: 6 Investigating and visualizing the internals of the networks
full.secZh: 6 网络内部结构的研究与可视化

items.en: We investigate the trained generators and discriminators in a variety of ways. We do not do any kind of nearest neighbor search on the training set. Nearest neighbors in pixel or feature space are trivially fooled (Theis et al., 2015) by small image transforms. We also do not use log-likelihood metrics to quantitatively assess the model, as it is a poor (Theis et al., 2015) metric.
items.zh: 我们以多种方式研究了训练好的生成器和判别器。我们没有对训练集进行任何最近邻搜索。像素或特征空间中的最近邻很容易被小的图像变换欺骗（Theis等人，2015）。我们也不使用对数似然指标来定量评估模型，因为它是一个较差的指标（Theis等人，2015）。

items.en: The first experiment we did was to understand the landscape of the latent space. Walking on the manifold that is learnt can usually tell us about signs of memorization (if there are sharp transitions) and about the way in which the space is hierarchically collapsed. If walking in this latent space results in semantic changes to the image generations (such as objects being added and removed), we can reason that the model has learned relevant and interesting representations. The results are shown in Fig.4.
items.zh: 我们做的第一个实验是理解潜在空间的景观。在学到的流形上行走通常可以告诉我们关于记忆的迹象（如果有尖锐的过渡）以及空间如何分层折叠。如果在这个潜在空间中行走导致图像生成发生语义变化（例如添加和移除物体），我们可以推断模型学到了相关且有趣的表示。结果如图4所示。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Top rows: Interpolation between a series of 9 random points in Z𝑍Z show that the space learned has smooth transitions, with every image in the space plausibly looking like a bedroom. In the 6th row, you see a room without a window slowly transforming into a room with a giant window. In the 10th row, you see what appears to be a TV slowly being transformed into a window.
items.capZh: 图4：顶行：在Z中9个随机点之间的插值显示学到的空间具有平滑过渡，空间中的每个图像看起来都像卧室。在第6行，你看到一个没有窗户的房间逐渐变成一个有大窗户的房间。在第10行，你看到一台电视逐渐变成一扇窗户。

items.en: Previous work has demonstrated that supervised training of CNNs on large image datasets results in very powerful learned features (Zeiler & Fergus, 2014). Additionally, supervised CNNs trained on scene classification learn object detectors (Oquab et al., 2014). We demonstrate that an unsupervised DCGAN trained on a large image dataset can also learn a hierarchy of features that are interesting. Using guided backpropagation as proposed by (Springenberg et al., 2014), we show in Fig.5 that the features learnt by the discriminator activate on typical parts of a bedroom, like beds and windows. For comparison, in the same figure, we give a baseline for randomly initialized features that are not activated on anything that is semantically relevant or interesting.
items.zh: 先前的工作表明，在大图像数据集上对CNN进行监督训练会产生非常强大的学习特征（Zeiler & Fergus, 2014）。此外，用于场景分类的监督CNN学习物体检测器（Oquab等人，2014）。我们证明，在大图像数据集上训练的无监督DCGAN也可以学习到有趣的特征层次。使用Springenberg等人（2014）提出的引导反向传播，我们在图5中展示了判别器学到的特征激活在卧室的典型部分，如床和窗户。作为对比，在同一图中，我们给出了随机初始化特征的基线，这些特征没有激活任何语义相关或有趣的内容。

items.capEn: Figure 5: On the right, guided backpropagation visualizations of maximal axis-aligned responses for the first 6 learned convolutional features from the last convolution layer in the discriminator. Notice a significant minority of features respond to beds - the central object in the LSUN bedrooms dataset. On the left is a random filter baseline. Comparing to the previous responses there is little to no discrimination and random structure.
items.capZh: 图5：右侧：判别器最后一个卷积层中前6个学习到的卷积特征的最大轴对齐响应的引导反向传播可视化。注意到相当一部分特征对床有响应——LSUN卧室数据集中的中心物体。左侧是随机滤波器基线。与之前的响应相比，几乎没有区分度和随机结构。

items.en: In addition to the representations learnt by a discriminator, there is the question of what representations the generator learns. The quality of samples suggest that the generator learns specific object representations for major scene components such as beds, windows, lamps, doors, and miscellaneous furniture. In order to explore the form that these representations take, we conducted an experiment to attempt to remove windows from the generator completely.
items.zh: 除了判别器学到的表示，还有一个问题是生成器学到了什么表示。样本质量表明生成器学习了主要场景组件（如床、窗户、灯、门和各种家具）的特定物体表示。为了探索这些表示的形式，我们进行了一个实验，试图完全从生成器中移除窗户。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Top row: un-modified samples from model. Bottom row: the same samples generated with dropping out ”window” filters. Some windows are removed, others are transformed into objects with similar visual appearance such as doors and mirrors. Although visual quality decreased, overall scene composition stayed similar, suggesting the generator has done a good job disentangling scene representation from object representation. Extended experiments could be done to remove other objects from the image and modify the objects the generator draws.
items.capZh: 图6：顶行：模型的未修改样本。底行：相同样本，但丢弃了“窗户”滤波器。一些窗户被移除，另一些变成了视觉上相似的物体，如门和镜子。尽管视觉质量下降，但整体场景组成保持相似，表明生成器很好地解耦了场景表示和物体表示。可以扩展实验以移除图像中的其他物体并修改生成器绘制的物体。

items.en: On 150 samples, 52 window bounding boxes were drawn manually. On the second highest convolution layer features, logistic regression was fit to predict whether a feature activation was on a window (or not), by using the criterion that activations inside the drawn bounding boxes are positives and random samples from the same images are negatives. Using this simple model, all feature maps with weights greater than zero ( 200 in total) were dropped from all spatial locations. Then, random new samples were generated with and without the feature map removal.
items.zh: 在150个样本上，手动绘制了52个窗户边界框。在第二个最高卷积层特征上，拟合逻辑回归来预测特征激活是否在窗户上（或不在），使用标准：绘制的边界框内的激活为正样本，同一图像中的随机样本为负样本。使用这个简单模型，所有权重大于零的特征图（总共约200个）从所有空间位置丢弃。然后，随机生成带有和不带有特征图移除的新样本。

items.en: The generated images with and without the window dropout are shown in Fig.6, and interestingly, the network mostly forgets to draw windows in the bedrooms, replacing them with other objects.
items.zh: 带有和不带有窗户丢弃的生成图像如图6所示，有趣的是，网络大多忘记了在卧室中绘制窗户，而是用其他物体替换它们。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Vector arithmetic for visual concepts. For each column, the Z𝑍Z vectors of samples are averaged. Arithmetic was then performed on the mean vectors creating a new vector Y𝑌Y. The center sample on the right hand side is produce by feeding Y𝑌Y as input to the generator. To demonstrate the interpolation capabilities of the generator, uniform noise sampled with scale +-0.25 was added to Y𝑌Y to produce the 8 other samples. Applying arithmetic in the input space (bottom two examples) results in noisy overlap due to misalignment.
items.capZh: 图7：视觉概念的向量算术。对于每一列，对样本的Z向量进行平均。然后在平均向量上进行算术运算，生成一个新向量Y。右侧中心的样本是通过将Y作为生成器的输入产生的。为了展示生成器的插值能力，向Y添加了尺度为±0.25的均匀噪声采样，以生成其他8个样本。在输入空间中进行算术运算（底部两个示例）由于未对齐而导致噪声重叠。

items.capEn: Figure 8: A ”turn” vector was created from four averaged samples of faces looking left vs looking right. By adding interpolations along this axis to random samples we were able to reliably transform their pose.
items.capZh: 图8：通过平均四个向左看和向右看的面部样本，创建了一个“转向”向量。通过沿此轴添加插值到随机样本，我们能够可靠地变换它们的姿态。

items.en: In the context of evaluating learned representations of words (Mikolov et al., 2013) demonstrated that simple arithmetic operations revealed rich linear structure in representation space. One canonical example demonstrated that the vector(”King”) - vector(”Man”) + vector(”Woman”) resulted in a vector whose nearest neighbor was the vector for Queen. We investigated whether similar structure emerges in the Z𝑍Z representation of our generators. We performed similar arithmetic on the Z𝑍Z vectors of sets of exemplar samples for visual concepts. Experiments working on only single samples per concept were unstable, but averaging the Z𝑍Z vector for three examplars showed consistent and stable generations that semantically obeyed the arithmetic. In addition to the object manipulation shown in (Fig. 7), we demonstrate that face pose is also modeled linearly in Z𝑍Z space (Fig. 8).
items.zh: 在评估学习到的词表示的背景下（Mikolov等人，2013）证明了简单的算术运算揭示了表示空间中丰富的线性结构。一个典型示例表明，向量（“King”）- 向量（“Man”）+ 向量（“Woman”）得到的向量，其最近邻是向量“Queen”。我们研究了在我们的生成器的Z表示中是否出现类似的结构。我们对视觉概念的示例样本的Z向量进行了类似的算术运算。仅对每个概念使用单个样本的实验不稳定，但对三个示例的Z向量进行平均后，产生了语义上符合算术运算的一致且稳定的生成。除了图7中展示的对象操作外，我们还证明了面部姿态在Z空间中也是线性建模的（图8）。

items.en: These demonstrations suggest interesting applications can be developed using Z𝑍Z representations learned by our models. It has been previously demonstrated that conditional generative models can learn to convincingly model object attributes like scale, rotation, and position (Dosovitskiy et al., 2014). This is to our knowledge the first demonstration of this occurring in purely unsupervised models. Further exploring and developing the above mentioned vector arithmetic could dramatically reduce the amount of data needed for conditional generative modeling of complex image distributions.
items.zh: 这些演示表明，可以利用我们的模型学习的Z表示开发有趣的应用。先前已有证明，条件生成模型可以学习令人信服地建模对象属性，如尺度、旋转和位置（Dosovitskiy等人，2014）。据我们所知，这是首次在纯无监督模型中展示这一现象。进一步探索和发展上述向量算术可以显著减少复杂图像分布的条件生成建模所需的数据量。

items.en: We propose a more stable set of architectures for training generative adversarial networks and we give evidence that adversarial networks learn good representations of images for supervised learning and generative modeling. There are still some forms of model instability remaining - we noticed as models are trained longer they sometimes collapse a subset of filters to a single oscillating mode. Further work is needed to tackle this from of instability. We think that extending this framework to other domains such as video (for frame prediction) and audio (pre-trained features for speech synthesis) should be very interesting. Further investigations into the properties of the learnt latent space would be interesting as well.
items.zh: 我们提出了一套更稳定的训练生成对抗网络的架构，并提供了证据表明对抗网络为监督学习和生成建模学习了良好的图像表示。仍然存在一些模型不稳定性——我们注意到，随着模型训练时间延长，它们有时会将一部分滤波器坍缩为单个振荡模式。需要进一步的工作来解决这种不稳定性。我们认为，将该框架扩展到其他领域，如视频（用于帧预测）和音频（用于语音合成的预训练特征），应该非常有趣。进一步研究学习到的潜在空间的性质也将很有趣。

items.en: We are fortunate and thankful for all the advice and guidance we have received during this work, especially that of Ian Goodfellow, Tobias Springenberg, Arthur Szlam and Durk Kingma. Additionally we’d like to thank all of the folks at indico for providing support, resources, and conversations, especially the two other members of the indico research team, Dan Kuster and Nathan Lintz. Finally, we’d like to thank Nvidia for donating a Titan-X GPU used in this work.
items.zh: 我们非常幸运并感谢在本工作中获得的所有建议和指导，特别是Ian Goodfellow、Tobias Springenberg、Arthur Szlam和Durk Kingma。此外，我们感谢indico的所有人提供的支持、资源和对话，特别是indico研究团队的其他两名成员Dan Kuster和Nathan Lintz。最后，我们感谢Nvidia捐赠了本工作中使用的Titan-X GPU。
